mnemonics: CIA (Continuous Improvement Assessment) - Think of a secret agent constantly assessing and improving internal processes.
keyPoints: Focuses on iterative evaluation and improvement of internal processes for efficiency.
Often uses real-time data and feedback loops for adjustments.
Aims to minimize waste and maximize output or quality within a system.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with a one-time audit or a final evaluation at the end of a process.
Focusing only on cost reduction instead of a holistic view of performance metrics like quality and speed.
Neglecting to close the feedback loop, making the evaluation data useless for actual improvement.
